query_intent: For 2000 non-returned transactions, compare store quantity and value against combined web+catalog quantity and value for the same customer-item-year records.

dag_nodes.intent: Aggregate yearly non-returned web quantities, wholesale cost, and sales price by item and billing customer.
Aggregate yearly non-returned catalog quantities, wholesale cost, and sales price by item and billing customer.
Aggregate yearly non-returned store quantities, wholesale cost, and sales price by item and customer.
Left-join store aggregates to web and catalog aggregates on year/item/customer, keep rows with other-channel activity, and report store-to-other-channel quantity ratio and value comparisons.
